title: Salvage restore-test report (schema_version 1)
description: The full outcome of a single Salvage restore-test, as emitted by 'salvage run' (report.out file, -json stdout) and submitted for attestation. This document is immutable: a breaking change to the report shape bumps schema_version and publishes a new document at a new URL.

schema_version.description: Monotonic integer version of this report contract.

version.description: The salvage binary version that produced this report.

target.description: The configured target name the restore-test ran against.

method.description: The engine that performed the restore (the target.type). "exec" marks an operator-supplied restore command.

severity.description: A failing advisory check is recorded but does not fail the verdict. Absent severity means required.
